members.name: AddTranslation
members.summary: Adds a translation.

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Removes all translations.

members.name: FindTranslations
members.signature: public Translation[] FindTranslations(String locale, bool exact)
members.summary: Returns the [Translation] instances that match [param locale] (see [method TranslationServer.compare_locales]). If [param exact] is [code]true[/code], only instances whose locale exactly equals [param locale] will be returned.

members.name: GetLocaleOverride
members.summary: Returns the locale override of the domain. Returns an empty string if locale override is disabled.

members.name: GetTranslationObject
members.summary: Returns the [Translation] instance that best matches [param locale]. Returns [code]null[/code] if there are no matches.

members.name: GetTranslations
members.summary: Returns all available [Translation] instances as added by [method add_translation].

members.name: HasTranslation
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this translation domain contains the given [param translation].

members.name: HasTranslationForLocale
members.signature: public bool HasTranslationForLocale(String locale, bool exact)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if there are any [Translation] instances that match [param locale] (see [method TranslationServer.compare_locales]). If [param exact] is [code]true[/code], only instances whose locale exactly equals [param locale] are considered.

members.name: Pseudolocalize
members.summary: Returns the pseudolocalized string based on the [param message] passed in.

members.name: RemoveTranslation
members.summary: Removes the given translation.

members.name: SetLocaleOverride
members.summary: Sets the locale override of the domain. If [param locale] is an empty string, locale override is disabled. Otherwise, [param locale] will be standardized to match known locales (e.g. [code]en-US[/code] would be matched to [code]en_US[/code]). [b]Note:[/b] Calling this method does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] signal manually.

members.name: Translate
members.signature: public StringName Translate(StringName message, StringName context)
members.summary: Returns the current locale's translation for the given message and context.

members.name: TranslatePlural
members.signature: public StringName TranslatePlural(StringName message, StringName messagePlural, int n, StringName context)
members.summary: Returns the current locale's translation for the given message, plural message and context. The number [param n] is the number or quantity of the plural object. It will be used to guide the translation system to fetch the correct plural form for the selected language.

members.name: Enabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], translation is enabled. Otherwise, [method translate] and [method translate_plural] will return the input message unchanged regardless of the current locale.

members.name: PseudolocalizationAccentsEnabled
members.summary: Replace all characters with their accented variants during pseudolocalization. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationDoubleVowelsEnabled
members.summary: Double vowels in strings during pseudolocalization to simulate the lengthening of text due to localization. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables pseudolocalization for the project. This can be used to spot untranslatable strings or layout issues that may occur once the project is localized to languages that have longer strings than the source language. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationExpansionRatio
members.summary: The expansion ratio to use during pseudolocalization. A value of [code]0.3[/code] is sufficient for most practical purposes, and will increase the length of each string by 30%. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationFakeBidiEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], emulate bidirectional (right-to-left) text when pseudolocalization is enabled. This can be used to spot issues with RTL layout and UI mirroring that will crop up if the project is localized to RTL languages such as Arabic or Hebrew. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationOverrideEnabled
members.summary: Replace all characters in the string with [code]*[/code]. Useful for finding non-localizable strings. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationPrefix
members.summary: Prefix that will be prepended to the pseudolocalized string. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationSkipPlaceholdersEnabled
members.summary: Skip placeholders for string formatting like [code]%s[/code] or [code]%f[/code] during pseudolocalization. Useful to identify strings which need additional control characters to display correctly. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.

members.name: PseudolocalizationSuffix
members.summary: Suffix that will be appended to the pseudolocalized string. [b]Note:[/b] Updating this property does not automatically update texts in the scene tree. Please propagate the [constant MainLoop.NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED] notification manually after you have finished modifying pseudolocalization related options.
